raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I attempted to pay my maintenance fees to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on line in the amount of {$2100.00}. I was using my Sears XXXX. When I clicked " pay '' I received a pop up from Sears that something went wrong and to try again. I did so, and the payment was successful. I thought that was the end of it. However, in XXXX I received my billing statement from Sears and they were charging me for two payments to XXXX XXXX each in the amount of {$2100.00}. I immediately called Sears and they informed me they would issue me a credit for one of the payments. I paid my Sears bill less {$2100.00} and again thought that was the end of it. However, in XXXX I received a bill from XXXX XXXX notifying me that my maintenance fees were past due. I called them on XX/XX/XXXX and was told they had received payment from Sears but Sears then clawed back the {$2100.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. I paid XXXX XXXX over the phone using a different credit card. Since then, I have been trying to get Sears to give me a credit in the amount of {$2100.00}. Sears however is telling me they never clawed back the {$2100.00}. That has left me being out {$2100.00} and both companies telling me the other is at fault and neither company providing me with evidence of what happened to my money.
